nuestra_agua.name: Los Ricos
nuestra_agua.notes: Pilot system at Caminos Field Center. First Nuestra Agua system.

nuestra_agua.name: Alonso Yáñez
nuestra_agua.notes: Largest system. Includes domestic water distribution. Site of INSP/Columbia University fluoride health study 2024–2026.

nuestra_agua.name: San Elías
nuestra_agua.notes: Went online January 2026. First system integrated into state monitoring program.
